message:
fix(checkpoint): fix two bugs in auto-checkpoint worker (ntm-s7mx)

- Fix Stop() logging "Stopped" even when worker was never started
  (when config.Enabled is false)
- Fix isAutoCheckpoint() prefix check to use "auto-" instead of "auto"
  to avoid matching user checkpoints named "automatic" or "automation"
- Add test cases for the prefix edge cases

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
